mapper.insert: INSERT INTO warehouse_table ( warehouse_name, warehouse_space, warehouse_address, warehouse_amount ) VALUES ( #{warehouseName}, #{warehouseSpace}, #{warehouseAddress}, #{warehouseAmount} )
mapper.select: SELECT warehouse_id AS warehouseId, warehouse_name AS warehouseName, warehouse_space AS warehouseSpace, warehouse_address AS warehouseAddress, warehouse_amount AS warehouseAmount FROM warehouse_table WHERE warehouse_id = #{id}

SELECT warehouse_id AS warehouseId, warehouse_name AS warehouseName, warehouse_space AS warehouseSpace, warehouse_address AS warehouseAddress, warehouse_amount AS warehouseAmount FROM warehouse_table ORDER BY warehouse_id DESC

SELECT warehouse_id AS warehouseId, warehouse_name AS warehouseName, warehouse_space AS warehouseSpace, warehouse_address AS warehouseAddress, warehouse_amount AS warehouseAmount FROM warehouse_table WHERE warehouse_address like CONCAT('%', #{address}, '%')
mapper.update: update warehouse_table set warehouse_name = #{warehouseName}, warehouse_space = #{warehouseSpace}, warehouse_address = #{warehouseAddress}, warehouse_amount = #{warehouseAmount} where warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}
